pain_found: Owner-approved IDs and canonical registry IDs drifted, blocking coherent install wave planning.
Generic jsonschema cards created ambiguity for check-jsonschema CLI decisioning.
mechanicus_learning: Owner-approved IDs must be normalized to explicit canonical capability cards before any wave admission.
Alias map must preserve relation to legacy/generic cards instead of silent duplication.
future_instruction: Never start controlled install wave if Owner-approved IDs are missing or unmapped in canonical registry/alias map.

useful_outputs: wave-001 patch artifact with full recipe fields
waste_points: Large repo discovery output required filtering before focused edits.
missing_tools: Unified canonical-ID reconciliation utility across registry/matrix/wave artifacts.
future_prompt_improvements: Provide explicit dirty-state admission template in taskpack when pre-existing untracked artifacts are expected.
Provide canonical card schema snippet inside execution prompt for faster aligned card creation.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add dedicated gate: OWNER_APPROVED_ID_CANONICAL_MATCH before wave files are generated.
